TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Elva_Hsiao, title = Elva_Hsiao, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Elva_Hsiao} }

S.FORM: Elva Hsiao Elva Hsiao angangan kalunasulitan niza tatenga' a ngangan: Ťē≠ťõÖšĻč(naayaw misumad) ayzaay a ngangan: Ťē≠šļěŤĽí Loma sasuala tu sulit: Hsiao Yasyuan Amilika a ngangan: Elva Hsiao malimula a ngangan: Elva, kanatal: Conghwaminko cidekay: Hulam nalecuhan: 1979 a mihcan 8 a bulad 24 a demiad Taywan Taoyuen Congli kawaw: mudadiway,mupalaway,zikuz-mitekelay kamu: Hulam,Amilika,Kountoungwa,Lipun,Korea,Minan papayzaan: Citucyaw u siwkay niza Elva Hsiao (1979.8.24) tatayna. nuayway a ngangan niza sa ci Hsiao Yace, i 2009 misumad tu ngangan niza. singanganay a mudadiway i Taywan. nalecuhan i Taywan Taoyuen Congli. natahkal ciniza sa , sakamutu ku myiti panganganan ku " sepat adidi'ay a Tienhou". matineng misalukyaw atu musazikuc. naitiza i Lipun patahkal ku Amilika dadiw nalimaan. i 2000 a mihcan maala ciniza ku " kitakit Hulam kamu a dadiw sakayadahay pacakay a kawlah". manamuh ci Corn Kongling cinizaan, manamuh miazih mitengil cinizaan. amisupet ci Corn uyniyan a kasabelih. ci Corn sa, u limecedan nu Hulam a kaying. siicel, sibangcalay a bihid, sidihkuay a balucu'. sikawaw ciniza i Cengce Tabakiay a cacudadan ayza. sakamu ci Corn, Elva Hsiao u kapahay a mudadiway, asu' ku suni, asu' ku tawa, sisa manamuh ci Corn cinizaan. u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam Elva Hsiao (simplified Chinese: ŤźßšļöŤĹ©; traditional Chinese: Ťē≠šļěŤĽí; pinyin: XińĀo YńÉxuńĀn, born 24 August 1979) is a Taiwanese singer and actress. u dadiw nalimaan niza Hsiao Yasian Ťē≠šļěŤĽí(1999) sumanahay a cyangwei-balu ÁīÖŤĖĒŤĖá(2000) anucila a demiad śėéŚ§©(2001) Elva First(2001) 4U(2002) sasumidang a angangan a dadiwňź micepcep śĄõÁöĄšłĽśČďś≠Ć¬∑ŚźĽ(2002) malemu'ay tu lemu' śĄõšłäśĄõ(2003) sakalima a tabakiaya a zazan Á¨¨šļĒŚ§ßťĀď(2003) 1087(2006) tulu ku bihid a SiawašłČťĚĘŚ§ŹŚ®É(2008) cuan-baetu a waneng ťĎĹÁü≥Á≥Ė(2009) sangulan a kaying Ťē≠ÁĀĎŚįŹŚßź(2010) mamelu' kaku tisuwanan śąĎśĄõśąĎ(2011) caay misupuelac ku cepcep nu maku šłćŤß£ťáčŤ¶™ŚźĽ(2014) u dadiw nu saungay nu binawlan
S.PHON: …ôr~…ĺ*a ńßsiao …ôr~…ĺ*a ńßsiao aŇčaŇčan kar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan niza tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° a ŇčaŇčan: ***(naajaw misumad) ajzaaj a ŇčaŇčan: *** r~…ĺoma sasuar~…ĺa tu sur~…ĺit: ńßsiao jasjuan amir~…ĺika a ŇčaŇčan: …ôr~…ĺ*a ńßsiao mar~…ĺimur~…ĺa a ŇčaŇčan: …ôr~…ĺ*a, kanatar~…ĺ: ¶oŇčńßwaminko ¶id…ôkaj: ńßur~…ĺam nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan: **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad tajwan taoju…ôn ¶oŇčr~…ĺi kawaw: mudadiwaj,mupar~…ĺawaj,zikuz-mit…ôk…ôr~…ĺaj kamu: ńßur~…ĺam,amir~…ĺika,kountouŇčwa,r~…ĺipun,kor…ôa,minan papajzaan: ¶itu ¶jaw u siwkaj niza …ôr~…ĺ*a ńßsiao (****.*.**) tatajna. nuajwaj a ŇčaŇčan niza sa ¶i ńßsiao ja ¶…ô, i **** misumad tu ŇčaŇčan niza. siŇčaŇčanaj a mudadiwaj i tajwan. nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i tajwan taoju…ôn ¶oŇčr~…ĺi. natańßkar~…ĺ ¶iniza sa , sakamutu ku mjiti paŇčaŇčanan ku " s…ôpat adidi Ē~ °aj a ti…ônńßou". matin…ôŇč misar~…ĺukjaw atu musaziku ¶. naitiza i r~…ĺipun patańßkar~…ĺ ku amir~…ĺika dadiw nar~…ĺimaan. i **** a mińß ¶an maar~…ĺa ¶iniza ku " kitakit ńßur~…ĺam kamu a dadiw sakajadańßaj pa ¶akaj a kawr~…ĺańß". manamuńß ¶i ¶orn koŇčr~…ĺiŇč ¶inizaan, manamuńß miazińß mit…ôŇčir~…ĺ ¶inizaan. amisup…ôt ¶i ¶orn ujnijan a kasab…ôr~…ĺińß. ¶i ¶orn sa, u r~…ĺim…ô ¶…ôdan nu ńßur~…ĺam a kajiŇč. sii ¶…ôr~…ĺ, sibaŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj a bińßid, sidińßkuaj a bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. sikawaw ¶iniza i ¶…ôŇč ¶…ô tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan ajza. sakamu ¶i ¶orn, …ôr~…ĺ*a ńßsiao u kapańßaj a mudadiwaj, asu Ē~ ° ku suni, asu Ē~ ° ku tawa, sisa manamuńß ¶i ¶orn ¶inizaan. u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam …ôr~…ĺ*a ńßsiao (simpr~…ĺifi…ôd ¶ńßin…ôs…ô: ***; traditionar~…ĺ ¶ńßin…ôs…ô: ***; pinjin: *i*o j**u*n, born ** august ****) is a taiwan…ôs…ô siŇč…ôr and a ¶tr…ôss. u dadiw nar~…ĺimaan niza ńßsiao jasian ***(****) sumanańßaj a ¶jaŇčw…ôi-bar~…ĺu ***(****) anu ¶ir~…ĺa a d…ômiad **(****) …ôr~…ĺ*a first(****) *u(****) sasumidaŇč a aŇčaŇčan a dadiw* mi ¶…ôp ¶…ôp *******(****) mar~…ĺ…ômu Ē~ °aj tu r~…ĺ…ômu Ē~ ° ***(****) sakar~…ĺima a tabakiaja a zazan ****(****) ****(****) tur~…ĺu ku bińßid a siawa****(****) ¶uan-ba…ôtu a wan…ôŇč ***(****) saŇčur~…ĺan a kajiŇč ****(****) mam…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° kaku tisuwanan ***(****) ¶aaj misupu…ôr~…ĺa ¶ ku ¶…ôp ¶…ôp nu maku *****(****) u dadiw nu sauŇčaj nu binawr~…ĺan
S.FORM: Elva Hsiao Elva Hsiao angangan kalunasulitan niza tatenga' a ngangan: Ťē≠ťõÖšĻč(naayaw misumad) ayzaay a ngangan: Ťē≠šļěŤĽí Loma sasuala tu sulit: Hsiao Yasyuan Amilika a ngangan: Elva Hsiao malimula a ngangan: Elva, kanatal: Conghwaminko cidekay: Hulam nalecuhan: 1979 a mihcan 8 a bulad 24 a demiad Taywan Taoyuen Congli kawaw: mudadiway,mupalaway,zikuz-mitekelay kamu: Hulam,Amilika,Kountoungwa,Lipun,Korea,Minan papayzaan: Citucyaw u siwkay niza Elva Hsiao (1979.8.24) tatayna. nuayway a ngangan niza sa ci Hsiao Yace, i 2009 misumad tu ngangan niza. singanganay a mudadiway i Taywan. nalecuhan i Taywan Taoyuen Congli. natahkal ciniza sa , sakamutu ku myiti panganganan ku " sepat adidi'ay a Tienhou". matineng misalukyaw atu musazikuc. naitiza i Lipun patahkal ku Amilika dadiw nalimaan. i 2000 a mihcan maala ciniza ku " kitakit Hulam kamu a dadiw sakayadahay pacakay a kawlah". manamuh ci Corn Kongling cinizaan, manamuh miazih mitengil cinizaan. amisupet ci Corn uyniyan a kasabelih. ci Corn sa, u limecedan nu Hulam a kaying. siicel, sibangcalay a bihid, sidihkuay a balucu'. sikawaw ciniza i Cengce Tabakiay a cacudadan ayza. sakamu ci Corn, Elva Hsiao u kapahay a mudadiway, asu' ku suni, asu' ku tawa, sisa manamuh ci Corn cinizaan. u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam Elva Hsiao (simplified Chinese: ŤźßšļöŤĹ©; traditional Chinese: Ťē≠šļěŤĽí; pinyin: XińĀo YńÉxuńĀn, born 24 August 1979) is a Taiwanese singer and actress. u dadiw nalimaan niza Hsiao Yasian Ťē≠šļěŤĽí(1999) sumanahay a cyangwei-balu ÁīÖŤĖĒŤĖá(2000) anucila a demiad śėéŚ§©(2001) Elva First(2001) 4U(2002) sasumidang a angangan a dadiwňź micepcep śĄõÁöĄšłĽśČďś≠Ć¬∑ŚźĽ(2002) malemu'ay tu lemu' śĄõšłäśĄõ(2003) sakalima a tabakiaya a zazan Á¨¨šļĒŚ§ßťĀď(2003) 1087(2006) tulu ku bihid a SiawašłČťĚĘŚ§ŹŚ®É(2008) cuan-baetu a waneng ťĎĹÁü≥Á≥Ė(2009) sangulan a kaying Ťē≠ÁĀĎŚįŹŚßź(2010) mamelu' kaku tisuwanan śąĎśĄõśąĎ(2011) caay misupuelac ku cepcep nu maku šłćŤß£ťáčŤ¶™ŚźĽ(2014) u dadiw nu saungay nu binawlan
S.PHON: …ôr~…ĺ*a ńßsiao …ôr~…ĺ*a ńßsiao aŇčaŇčan kar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan niza tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° a ŇčaŇčan: ***(naajaw misumad) ajzaaj a ŇčaŇčan: *** r~…ĺoma sasuar~…ĺa tu sur~…ĺit: ńßsiao jasjuan amir~…ĺika a ŇčaŇčan: …ôr~…ĺ*a ńßsiao mar~…ĺimur~…ĺa a ŇčaŇčan: …ôr~…ĺ*a, kanatar~…ĺ: ¶oŇčńßwaminko ¶id…ôkaj: ńßur~…ĺam nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan: **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad tajwan taoju…ôn ¶oŇčr~…ĺi kawaw: mudadiwaj,mupar~…ĺawaj,zikuz-mit…ôk…ôr~…ĺaj kamu: ńßur~…ĺam,amir~…ĺika,kountouŇčwa,r~…ĺipun,kor…ôa,minan papajzaan: ¶itu ¶jaw u siwkaj niza …ôr~…ĺ*a ńßsiao (****.*.**) tatajna. nuajwaj a ŇčaŇčan niza sa ¶i ńßsiao ja ¶…ô, i **** misumad tu ŇčaŇčan niza. siŇčaŇčanaj a mudadiwaj i tajwan. nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i tajwan taoju…ôn ¶oŇčr~…ĺi. natańßkar~…ĺ ¶iniza sa , sakamutu ku mjiti paŇčaŇčanan ku " s…ôpat adidi Ē~ °aj a ti…ônńßou". matin…ôŇč misar~…ĺukjaw atu musaziku ¶. naitiza i r~…ĺipun patańßkar~…ĺ ku amir~…ĺika dadiw nar~…ĺimaan. i **** a mińß ¶an maar~…ĺa ¶iniza ku " kitakit ńßur~…ĺam kamu a dadiw sakajadańßaj pa ¶akaj a kawr~…ĺańß". manamuńß ¶i ¶orn koŇčr~…ĺiŇč ¶inizaan, manamuńß miazińß mit…ôŇčir~…ĺ ¶inizaan. amisup…ôt ¶i ¶orn ujnijan a kasab…ôr~…ĺińß. ¶i ¶orn sa, u r~…ĺim…ô ¶…ôdan nu ńßur~…ĺam a kajiŇč. sii ¶…ôr~…ĺ, sibaŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj a bińßid, sidińßkuaj a bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. sikawaw ¶iniza i ¶…ôŇč ¶…ô tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan ajza. sakamu ¶i ¶orn, …ôr~…ĺ*a ńßsiao u kapańßaj a mudadiwaj, asu Ē~ ° ku suni, asu Ē~ ° ku tawa, sisa manamuńß ¶i ¶orn ¶inizaan. u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam …ôr~…ĺ*a ńßsiao (simpr~…ĺifi…ôd ¶ńßin…ôs…ô: ***; traditionar~…ĺ ¶ńßin…ôs…ô: ***; pinjin: *i*o j**u*n, born ** august ****) is a taiwan…ôs…ô siŇč…ôr and a ¶tr…ôss. u dadiw nar~…ĺimaan niza ńßsiao jasian ***(****) sumanańßaj a ¶jaŇčw…ôi-bar~…ĺu ***(****) anu ¶ir~…ĺa a d…ômiad **(****) …ôr~…ĺ*a first(****) *u(****) sasumidaŇč a aŇčaŇčan a dadiw* mi ¶…ôp ¶…ôp *******(****) mar~…ĺ…ômu Ē~ °aj tu r~…ĺ…ômu Ē~ ° ***(****) sakar~…ĺima a tabakiaja a zazan ****(****) ****(****) tur~…ĺu ku bińßid a siawa****(****) ¶uan-ba…ôtu a wan…ôŇč ***(****) saŇčur~…ĺan a kajiŇč ****(****) mam…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° kaku tisuwanan ***(****) ¶aaj misupu…ôr~…ĺa ¶ ku ¶…ôp ¶…ôp nu maku *****(****) u dadiw nu sauŇčaj nu binawr~…ĺan
